name: Sandhill Garage Shed Plan - 14x20 Gable Garage Workshop | DIY PDF Building Plans
open_features: A classic peaked roof design provides excellent headroom, weather resistance, and timeless backyard style.
Designed to accommodate wide garage doors or double shed doors for easy storage of lawn equipment, motorcycles, ATVs, or workshop tools.
Straightforward framing, standard lumber sizes, and efficient structural layout make Sandhill ideal for both beginner and experienced builders.
The 280 sq ft layout offers plenty of room for workbenches, storage shelving, hobby space, or compact vehicle storage.
description_summary: Kickstart your next backyard upgrade with the Sandhill Garage Shed - a spacious 14x20 garage-style storage and workshop structure designed for durability, versatility, and clean traditional lines. Built with a classic gable roof and practical garage-style layout, Sandhill blends strong curb appeal with highly functional interior space.
